items.description: Fix pre-existing F401 lint errors in sdk/mutx/__init__.py
errorTypes: F401 unused imports: Command, MutxAgentClient, MutxAgentSyncClient, create_agent_client, Contacts
items.action: create branch, fix unused imports, submit PR, get CI green

pr.note: Note: the sdk/ directory did not exist on origin/main; this is a worktree-native SDK. CI Validation job passed (ruff checks). Swift Analyze still running but is unrelated to Python SDK.

sharedBlockers.blocker: sdk/mutx/__init__.py lint breakage on main — blocks ALL dependabot PRs and main branch CI
sharedBlockers.rootCause: Pre-existing F401 unused import errors in sdk/mutx/__init__.py (need X as X re-export syntax)
sharedBlockers.fix: Change bare imports to explicit re-exports: Command as Command, MutxAgentClient as MutxAgentClient, MutxAgentSyncClient as MutxAgentSyncClient, create_agent_client as create_agent_client, Contacts as Contacts
